# Function reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Widget

The reorderable puzzle widget and the `%%puzzle` cell magic.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [PuzzleWidget](PuzzleWidget.qmd#puzzle_widget.PuzzleWidget) | A reorderable list of code lines that checks itself against an expected result. |
| [widget.register_puzzle_magic](widget.register_puzzle_magic.qmd#puzzle_widget.widget.register_puzzle_magic) | Register the `%%puzzle` cell magic. |

## Checker

The pure exec-and-check engine behind the widget.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [checker.run_puzzle](checker.run_puzzle.qmd#puzzle_widget.checker.run_puzzle) | Run ``lines`` (joined with newlines) in a fresh, isolated namespace and |
